scope.goal: Eliminate the final four source files above 800 lines and make zero oversized files a permanent mechanical gate.
nonGoals: No new route, report, schema, fixture, cross-project contract, or product feature
No existing expectation or frozen fixture change
No Java or mini-kv process, build, test, or repository write
scope.stopCondition: The canonical census reports zero files over 800 lines, the empty baseline ratchet passes, all contract-preserving parity checks pass, and v2189 reaches the external N5 review checkpoint.

validationOrchestration.interruptionAfterShard5: The user interruption stopped the first shard-6 process before it produced a result; shards 1-5 had complete PASS logs and shards 6-8 were resumed without duplicating them.
validationOrchestration.firstShard8Attempt: A PowerShell wrapper used ErrorActionPreference=Stop and treated expected stderr from renderer-census negative tests as a terminating NativeCommandError before Vitest could finish.
validationOrchestration.resolution: Shard 8 was rerun directly with the identical Vitest shard, worker, reporter, and timeout arguments; it passed 68 files and 210 tests with exit code 0. No product code, expectation, fixture, timeout, or census threshold changed.
